overview: Amity University, particularly its flagship Noida campus, is one of India's leading private universities known for its world-class infrastructure, global collaborations, strong industry linkages, and high-volume placement records across engineering, management, and professional programs.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹7.24 Lakhs – ₹11.60 Lakhs total for 2 years (Non-Sponsored category)

placements.medianSalary: UG 4-Year: ₹6.00 LPA | PG 2-Year (MBA): ₹8.50 LPA | UG 3-Year: ₹4.08 LPA (NIRF 2025).
placements.companiesVisited: 800+ companies including Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Palo Alto Networks, Cisco, IBM, TCS, KPMG, Cognizant, Samsung.
placements.internationalOffers: International packages up to ₹2.00 Crore per annum.

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on entrance exams, merit in qualifying examinations, and university-specific selection processes depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission timelines vary by program and are announced annually on the official Amity University admission portal.
admissions.directAdmission: Students scoring 80% or above in Class XII are exempted from the selection process for certain programs.

campus.area: 1000+ acres across multiple campuses; Noida campus is the flagship campus.
campus.specialNote: One-time refundable caution deposit of ₹20,000 applicable for many programs. Hostel security deposit of ₹10,000 is refundable.

hostelFees.messFee: Approximately ₹40,000 – ₹50,000 per year or based on actual consumption.

scholarships.amityAdvantage: 10% fee concession for Amity students continuing from UG to PG programs.

contact.address: Amity University, Sector 125, Noida, Uttar Pradesh – 201313, India
